title: London Underground Piccadilly Line 1938 stock for MTR mod
description: The London Transport Museum's 1938 stock train
body:
The 1938 nderground 1938 Stock is a London Underground tube stock design. A total of 1,121 cars were built by Metro-Cammell and Birmingham RC&W.

This model was created by Skywalker_6517, with the bogies and couplers of the train provided by Extreme Maker X. Sounds (soon to be added in version 2.0.0) were provided by Georgecat19.

The train works for both Minecraft Transit Railway verions 3 and 4. Please note that in MTR4 you should spawn the train as "forward","trailer" and "back".
